emptyHeading: Scan your customers for churn risk
emptyBody: Upload a CSV with customer order data and AskBiz will automatically flag who’s at risk of not coming back.
noDataBody: Your uploaded data doesn’t have customer columns. Upload a CSV with customer ID and order date columns to enable churn scanning.
askAllAtRisk: Show me all my at-risk customers and their churn risk scores
askCustomerPrompt: Tell me about {name}’s purchase history and why they might be churning. Last order was {days} days ago, {orders} total orders, lifetime value {symbol}{ltv}.
